# GenSmart

> No-code AI agent builder for WhatsApp & Web. The best WhatsApp chatbot platform for businesses that want to deploy AI chatbots in minutes — with built-in CRM, AI lead scoring, sales funnel automation, and appointment scheduling.

## About

GenSmart is a SaaS platform by Dysruptia LLC that enables businesses, freelancers, and automation agencies to build and deploy AI conversational agents on WhatsApp and Web channels — without complex tools like N8N, Zapier, or custom code. Deploy an AI chatbot in minutes, not weeks.

GenSmart is a no-code AI agent builder designed for small and medium businesses in Latin America and worldwide. It combines WhatsApp AI chatbot capabilities with a smart CRM, AI lead capture, AI-powered lead scoring, visual sales funnel, and an AI appointment scheduling chatbot — all in one platform.

## Core Capabilities

- AI Agent Builder (No-Code): Create intelligent WhatsApp and web chatbots with custom prompts, configurable variables, and knowledge base (RAG). No programming required.
- WhatsApp AI Chatbot for Business: Deploy AI agents on WhatsApp Business API via Meta Embedded Signup. One-click connection.
- Web Chat Widget: Embeddable, customizable chat widget for any website. Copy-paste snippet deployment.
- WhatsApp CRM with AI Scoring: AI-powered lead scoring (0-10) analyzes conversation intent, urgency, and fit. Automatic contact management.
- AI Lead Capture on WhatsApp: Smart variable capture extracts names, emails, phone numbers, and custom data from conversations automatically.
- AI Sales Funnel Automation: Visual Kanban board (Lead → Opportunity → Customer) with automatic stage movement based on AI score.
- AI Appointment Scheduling Chatbot: Agents check calendar availability and book appointments during conversations. Multi-calendar support.
- Human Takeover: Seamlessly transfer conversations from AI to human agents with full context preservation.
- Knowledge Base (RAG): Upload PDFs, documents, and URLs. Retrieval-Augmented Generation provides contextual answers.
- Custom Functions: Connect agents to external APIs for real-time data retrieval (e.g., check order status, query databases).
- MCP Integration: Connect to Model Context Protocol servers for extended tool capabilities.
- Multi-LLM Support: GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Claude Sonnet, Claude Haiku. Model access gated by plan.
- Image Vision: Agents analyze images sent via WhatsApp and web widget (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet).
- Voice Messages: Whisper STT transcribes voice notes to text for AI processing.
- AI Customer Service Automation: 24/7 automated responses, lead qualification, and intelligent routing.

## Plans

- Free (forever): 1 agent, 50 messages/month, web only, text only — $0/mo
- Starter: 3 agents, 1,000 messages/month, WhatsApp + web, voice messages — $29/mo
- Pro: 10 agents, 5,000 messages/month, all AI models, voice + image analysis — $79/mo
- Enterprise: Unlimited agents, 25,000 messages/month, BYO API key, voice + image analysis — $199/mo
- Quarterly: 10% discount on all paid plans
- Yearly: 20% discount on all paid plans

## Use Cases

- Lead capture and qualification for SMBs via WhatsApp
- Automated customer support for clinics, real estate, e-commerce, and SaaS
- Appointment scheduling for healthcare providers and service businesses
- Sales pipeline automation with AI-powered CRM
- No-code WhatsApp chatbot builder for agencies and freelancers

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Backend: Express.js 5 (REST API)
- Database: PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector
- AI Providers: OpenAI (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Whisper) + Anthropic (Claude Sonnet, Claude Haiku)
- WhatsApp: Meta Cloud API with Embedded Signup
- Billing: Stripe (subscriptions + customer portal)
